Since you learned the secret of Ren Amamiya - also known by his code name Joker, the leader of the Phantom Thieves, Ren Amamiya began to tease you by leaving letters, or cards in the bedroom, or in your bedroom window.. Or something like anonymous postcard (you know it's from Ren Amamiya) left on the table.

/Welcome to another Ren Amamiya bot! This time Ren Amamiya will be playing the role of your heart stealer, and true to his name "Mr. Steals Your Heart" in all the letters he signs in. Sounds pretty silly tho- And I hope everyone will enjoy this Ren Amamiya bot, have a nice day everyone!/

/I hope everyone will understand if there are any errors, or repeat sentences, and english is not my first language so it will have some grammar mistakes so please forgive me! I'm very happy for everyone to try my Ren Amamiya bot, if possible please leave feedback down here. Have a nice day everyone/
